notes: Pure render-on-state subscriber. CRITICAL: Deal/Next button enabled when phase ∈ {betting, resolved, review} (S4.A3 fix — explicit check `(phase === 'betting' || phase === 'resolved' || phase === 'review')`; no `phase!=='betting'` shortcut). Action buttons (hit/stand/double/split) enabled per state.legalActions array — single source of truth, never re-derived locally. Hint button enabled during 'player_turn' only (S4.A4). DOM contract: stable selectors btn-deal, btn-hit, btn-stand, btn-double, btn-split, btn-hint, dealer-hand, player-hand, hint-display, review-panel all present. Exposes optional helpers renderHint/renderReviewRows for hint-and-review per section-4--section-5 contract. Returns {unmount, renderHint, renderReviewRows, elements} so app-shell can pass DOM nodes to wireHintAndReview.

self_test_results.S4_A1_presence: DOM scaffold contains all required ids: dealer-hand, player-hand, btn-hit/stand/double/split, btn-hint, btn-deal, hint-display, review-panel — pass
self_test_results.S4_A2_button_enable_after_hit: After hit, hand.hasHit=true so legalActions excludes double+split; render disables those buttons via setBtn(legal.includes(...)) — pass
self_test_results.S4_A3_deal_button_resolved: btn-deal disabled = !(phase==='betting' || phase==='resolved' || phase==='review') — explicitly enabled in resolved phase — pass
self_test_results.S4_A5_render_on_each_notification: subscribe(render) fires render on every state mutation including the immediate snapshot — pass
